title: Provider Token Pricing
description: Validates config/pricing.json — approximate per-token rates used by the cost estimator (scripts/lib/cost.py). Rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Time-sensitive: re-verify against official pricing. This schema formalizes the existing hand-maintained file; field names match the current keys to avoid a breaking migration.

default_output_tokens_per_item.description: Assumed output tokens/item when usage is not returned.

usage_based.description: true => not token-exact (e.g. Cursor agent); estimate is an upper bound.

subscription.description: true => no marginal per-token USD (plan-metered); rates are typically 0.

models.description: Per-model rate map; the '*' key is the fallback for unlisted models.
